name: 12-Week Strength Builder
description: A progressive strength programme that takes you from fundamentals to advanced compound lifts.
longDescription: This 12-week programme is designed for intermediate lifters who want to build a serious strength foundation. The programme follows a linear periodisation model, starting with hypertrophy-focused work in weeks 1-4, transitioning to strength in weeks 5-8, and peaking with intensity blocks in weeks 9-12. Each week includes 4 training days targeting the major compound movements: squat, bench press, deadlift, and overhead press. Accessory exercises are carefully selected to address common weaknesses and prevent imbalances.

modules.title: Foundation & Technique
modules.description: Movement assessment, form refinement, and baseline strength testing across all major lifts.

modules.title: Hypertrophy Block
modules.description: Higher volume work focused on muscle building with moderate loads and controlled tempos.

modules.title: Strength Transition
modules.description: Shift to lower rep ranges with heavier loads. Introduction to RPE-based auto-regulation.

modules.title: Intensity Peak
modules.description: Heavy singles and doubles. Peak week testing and PR attempts on all four main lifts.

modules.title: Deload & Retest
modules.description: Active recovery week with reduced volume, followed by comprehensive strength retesting.

name: Fat Loss Bootcamp
description: An intense 8-week programme combining HIIT, strength circuits, and nutrition guidance.
longDescription: This high-intensity bootcamp is designed for anyone serious about dropping body fat and building lean muscle. Over 8 weeks, you'll train 5 days per week with a mix of HIIT sessions, strength circuits, and active recovery days. The programme is paired with a custom nutrition plan from our dietitians, ensuring you're fuelling your workouts while maintaining a calorie deficit. Weekly weigh-ins and body composition tracking keep you accountable and motivated.

modules.title: Kickoff & Assessment
modules.description: Body composition testing, goal setting, and introduction to the training format.

modules.title: Circuit Foundations
modules.description: Learning key movements, building work capacity, and establishing training rhythm.

modules.title: Intensity Ramp
modules.description: Increased training density with shorter rest periods and added exercise complexity.

modules.title: Peak Conditioning
modules.description: Maximum intensity weeks with advanced supersets and metabolic finishers.

modules.title: Final Challenge
modules.description: Benchmark retest, body composition comparison, and next-step programme planning.

name: Mobility Masterclass
description: 6 weeks of targeted mobility work to unlock pain-free movement and better posture.
longDescription: If you sit at a desk all day or feel stiff and restricted in your movements, this programme is for you. Over 6 weeks, we systematically work through every major joint and muscle group using techniques from Functional Range Conditioning (FRC), yoga, and physical therapy. Each session includes joint CARs (controlled articular rotations), PAILs/RAILs stretches, and movement integration drills. You'll finish with significantly improved range of motion and a daily maintenance routine.

modules.title: Assessment & Baseline
modules.description: Joint-by-joint mobility screen and flexibility baseline measurements.

modules.title: Spine & Hips
modules.description: Thoracic spine mobility, hip flexor release, and core integration.

modules.title: Shoulders & Ankles
modules.description: Shoulder CARs, ankle dorsiflexion work, and overhead squat progression.

modules.title: Integration
modules.description: Combining improved mobility into functional movement patterns.

modules.title: Retest & Maintenance
modules.description: Final mobility screen, comparison to baseline, and daily maintenance plan.

name: Advanced Powerlifting
description: Competition-focused programme for experienced lifters targeting platform PRs.
longDescription: This 16-week peaking programme is designed for competitive powerlifters or advanced lifters preparing for a meet. Built on a conjugate-style training model, it develops absolute strength, speed strength, and competition-specific technique. The programme includes weekly max effort and dynamic effort days, plus targeted assistance work for weak points. You'll receive detailed video analysis of your lifts, weekly programme adjustments, and a complete competition-day strategy including warm-up progression and attempt selection.

modules.title: Off-Season Base
modules.description: High volume hypertrophy work to build a larger strength base and address weaknesses.

modules.title: Strength Accumulation
modules.description: Transition to heavier loads with competition-style pause squats, close-grip bench, and deficit pulls.

modules.title: Intensification
modules.description: Heavy singles and doubles at 85-95% with competition commands and tempo work.

modules.title: Peaking
modules.description: Tapering volume while maintaining intensity. Mock meet simulation and attempt planning.

modules.title: Competition Week
modules.description: Active recovery, warm-up rehearsal, and competition-day strategy finalisation.

name: Postpartum Recovery Programme
description: A gentle, evidence-based programme for new mothers returning to exercise safely.
longDescription: This 10-week programme is designed specifically for postpartum women looking to safely rebuild core strength, pelvic floor function, and overall fitness. Developed in collaboration with pelvic health physiotherapists, the programme progresses from gentle breathing and activation exercises in the early weeks to full-body strength training by week 10. Each stage includes diastasis recti assessment, pelvic floor screening, and modified exercises that respect the body's recovery timeline. Suitable for both vaginal delivery and C-section recovery (with medical clearance).

modules.title: Foundation & Breathing
modules.description: Diaphragmatic breathing, pelvic floor activation, and gentle core reconnection.

modules.title: Activation Progression
modules.description: Transverse abdominis engagement, glute activation, and walking programme.

modules.title: Strength Reintroduction
modules.description: Bodyweight exercises, resistance band work, and functional movement patterns.

modules.title: Full-Body Integration
modules.description: Compound movements, light weights, and progressive loading strategies.

modules.title: Confidence Building
modules.description: Return-to-activity planning, gym transition guide, and ongoing maintenance programme.

name: Mind & Body Wellness Journey
description: An 8-week holistic programme combining yoga, meditation, and mindful movement for complete wellbeing.
longDescription: This programme addresses the often-neglected connection between mental and physical health. Over 8 weeks, you'll progress through a carefully sequenced blend of yoga practice, guided meditation sessions, breathwork, and mindful movement exercises. Each week builds on the last, gradually deepening your practice and your understanding of the mind-body connection. Participants report improved sleep, reduced anxiety, better focus, and a renewed sense of energy and vitality.

modules.title: Introduction & Foundation
modules.description: Mindfulness fundamentals, basic breathing techniques, and gentle movement assessment.

modules.title: Building the Practice
modules.description: Daily meditation routines, sun salutation sequences, and body awareness exercises.

modules.title: Deepening the Connection
modules.description: Advanced breathwork, vinyasa flows, and guided visualisation techniques.

modules.title: Integration
modules.description: Combining all elements into a sustainable daily practice, stress management frameworks.

modules.title: Sustainability
modules.description: Personalised ongoing practice plan, community resources, and progress celebration.
